# Pull Request

## Summary

Provide a concise description of the changes introduced by this pull request.

Example:

* Added Transformer From Scratch notebook
* Updated RAG learning resources
* Fixed broken links in README

---

## Type of Change

Select all that apply:

* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] Learning Resource
* [ ] Notebook
* [ ] Project
* [ ] Research Summary
* [ ] Bug Fix
* [ ] Refactor
* [ ] CI/CD
* [ ] Other

---

## Related Issue

Link any related issue.

Example:

Fixes #123

Closes #456

Related to #789

---

## What Was Added or Changed?

Provide details about the contribution.

Example:

* Added LangGraph tutorial
* Added implementation notebook
* Added deployment instructions

---

## Why Is This Change Valuable?

Explain the impact.

Example:

* Improves beginner onboarding
* Covers an important missing concept
* Updates outdated resources
* Fixes incorrect information

---

## Files Modified

List the major files affected.

Example:

* deep-learning/transformers.md
* notebooks/attention.ipynb
* README.md

---

## Testing Performed

Select all that apply:

* [ ] Notebook executes successfully
* [ ] Code tested locally
* [ ] Links verified
* [ ] Documentation reviewed
* [ ] Examples validated
* [ ] Not applicable

Provide additional testing details if needed.

---

## Screenshots or Outputs

If applicable, attach:

* Screenshots
* Graphs
* Notebook outputs
* Demo GIFs

---

## Documentation Checklist

* [ ] Documentation updated
* [ ] README updated if needed
* [ ] Links are working
* [ ] Examples are correct
* [ ] Formatting reviewed

---

## Project Submission Checklist

If this PR includes a project:

* [ ] README included
* [ ] Installation instructions provided
* [ ] Requirements file included
* [ ] Architecture explained
* [ ] Example outputs provided

---

## Notebook Checklist

If this PR includes a notebook:

* [ ] Runs from start to finish
* [ ] Clear explanations included
* [ ] Reproducible results
* [ ] Dependencies documented

---

## Resource Submission Checklist

If this PR includes resources:

* [ ] Resource is relevant
* [ ] Resource is active
* [ ] Resource is high quality
* [ ] Resource category is appropriate

---

## Additional Notes

Include any context reviewers should know before reviewing this pull request.

---

## Contributor Confirmation

By submitting this pull request, I confirm that:

* [ ] My contribution follows repository guidelines.
* [ ] I have reviewed the Code of Conduct.
* [ ] I have verified my changes.
* [ ] I have the right to contribute this content.
